model_source.name: Biohub ESMFold2
model_source.execution_mode: fresh_structure_inference_for saved target-result panels; consolidated final bundle reuses those scored outputs

weights_or_checkpoint.local_or_artifact_path: local Hugging Face cache visible to the pgt environment during scoring

model_source.inference_command_or_method: Default CAMEO run used TORCH_CUDNN_SDPA_ENABLED=0 CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=3 /ewsc/yektefai/envs/envs/pgt/bin/python scripts/evaluate_esmfold2_cameo.py --max-len 650 --num-loops 3 --num-sampling-steps 14 --num-diffusion-samples 1. Scaled panels used num_loops=10, num_sampling_steps=68, num_diffusion_samples=5, seed 0, best-by-pTM target summaries.

known_gaps: Legacy ESMFold2 runs did not record the exact Hugging Face model cache revision/hash or original online download command. Future ESMFold2 entries must record this before target scoring.
The final bundle consolidates multiple scored source runs; some RCSB candidate-generation scripts and raw downloaded structures remain in source roots rather than tracked MCP artifacts.

known_gaps: This finding did not run fresh STATE inference; it is intentionally based on official precomputed scored CSVs.
The full Hugging Face file manifest from the prior source run is not packaged as a tracked artifact in this repository; compact repo-level provenance is recorded here.
Exact HF snapshot revisions for each STATE model repository should be backfilled before using this as a fully reproducible checkpoint-download recipe.
